During my appointment, the LLC will be inactive other than to collect remaining receivables, the final installment of my book advance, international book advance payments, and book royalties. (2025-08-01)
This entity will be dissolved before entering government service.  It holds no assets. (2025-08-01)
I will forfeit my vested profits interest units in August 2025.  I hold no unvested profits interest units. (2025-08-01)
Violet Flame, LLC, will be dissolved before entering government service.  All partnership agreements with outside entities will terminate before entering government service. (2025-08-01)
I will transfer my assets out of this one-participant 401(k) plan. (2025-04-01)

I will forfeit all Levels Health, Inc., unvested stock options at the time of my resignation.  I will divest my vested stock options in Levels Health, Inc., as soon as practicable but not later than 90 days after my confirmation.  If I divest the stock options by exercising them, I will divest the resulting stock as soon as practicable but not later than 90 days after my confirmation. (2023-08-01)

I will divest my vested restricted stock awards (stock) in Levels Health, Inc., as soon as practicable but not later than 90 days after my confirmation. If I divest the stock options by exercising them, I will divest the resulting stock as soon as practicable but not later than 90 days after my confirmation. (2020-04-01)
